languages.text: "Ох, пузатый господин, зря ты так. Слушаю я про твое будущее, и понимаю — если сейчас не окстишься, то треснешь ты и не соберешь себя заново. Ждут они тебя за дверкой, хохочут и ждут".

traits.locale_text: "Ох, пузатый господин, зря ты так. Слушаю я про твое будущее, и понимаю — если сейчас не окстишься, то треснешь ты и не соберешь себя заново. Ждут они тебя за дверкой, хохочут и ждут".
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."
languages.original_text: "Ох, пузатый господин, зря ты так. Слушаю я про твое будущее, и понимаю — если сейчас не окстишься, то треснешь ты и не соберешь себя заново. Ждут они тебя за дверкой, хохочут и ждут".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Master Potbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

"Oh, Master Potbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

"Oh, Master Potbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

languages.text: «Ah, maestro engranaje barrigón, se equivoca. Estoy escuchando muchas noticias sobre su futuro, y puedo decirle que, si no recapacita ahora, se romperá y no podrá recomponerse. Le esperan más allá del umbral, riendo y acechando».
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: «Ah, maestro engranaje barrigón, se equivoca. Estoy escuchando muchas noticias sobre su futuro, y puedo decirle que, si no recapacita ahora, se romperá y no podrá recomponerse. Le esperan más allá del umbral, riendo y acechando».

languages.text: “哎，大铁肚贤者，你错了。我可是把你未来的事都听得一清二楚。我敢说，你要是现在还不清醒过来，你就会彻底崩溃，再也拼不回原样了。他们正在门外等着你呢，边笑边等。”
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: “哎，大铁肚贤者，你错了。我可是把你未来的事都听得一清二楚。我敢说，你要是现在还不清醒过来，你就会彻底崩溃，再也拼不回原样了。他们正在门外等着你呢，边笑边等。”

languages.text: « Oh, maître ventripotent, vous avez tort. Mes murmures me soufflent ce que vous réserve votre avenir, et je peux vous dire que si vous refusez d'entendre raison, vous finirez par craquer pour de bon. Ils vous attendent derrière la porte en riant. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: « Oh, maître ventripotent, vous avez tort. Mes murmures me soufflent ce que vous réserve votre avenir, et je peux vous dire que si vous refusez d'entendre raison, vous finirez par craquer pour de bon. Ils vous attendent derrière la porte en riant. »

languages.text: "Üstat Dişli Göbek, yanılıyorsun. Geleceğinle ilgili her şeyi duyuyorum ve sana söyleyebilirim ki eğer şimdi aklını başına toplamazsan çatlayacaksın ve kendini bir daha asla toparlayamayacaksın. Kapının ardında seni bekliyorlar, gülüşerek hem de."
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: "Üstat Dişli Göbek, yanılıyorsun. Geleceğinle ilgili her şeyi duyuyorum ve sana söyleyebilirim ki eğer şimdi aklını başına toplamazsan çatlayacaksın ve kendini bir daha asla toparlayamayacaksın. Kapının ardında seni bekliyorlar, gülüşerek hem de."

languages.text: "Oh, Meister Ritzelbauch, Ihr irrt Euch. Ich habe alles über Eure Zukunft gehört und kann sagen, wenn Ihr nicht zu Sinnen kommt, werdet Ihr zerspringen und nicht in der Lage sein, Euch wieder zusammenzusetzen. Sie warten hinter der Tür auf Euch und lachen."
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, Meister Ritzelbauch, Ihr irrt Euch. Ich habe alles über Eure Zukunft gehört und kann sagen, wenn Ihr nicht zu Sinnen kommt, werdet Ihr zerspringen und nicht in der Lage sein, Euch wieder zusammenzusetzen. Sie warten hinter der Tür auf Euch und lachen."

languages.text: 「あら、コグ腹のだんな、あんたは間違ってるよ。あんたの未来のこと、あたいにはぜんぶ聞こえてるんだ。今すぐ正気に戻らなけりゃ、あんたはパキッと割れて、二度と元には戻れやしない。奴らは扉の向こうで待ってる――笑いながら、ね。」
languages.original_text: "Oh, Master Cogbelly, you're wrong. I'm hearing all about your future, and I can tell that if you don't come to your senses now, you'll crack and you won't be able to put yourself back together again. They are waiting for you beyond the door, laughing and waiting."

traits.locale_text: 「あら、コグ腹のだんな、あんたは間違ってるよ。あんたの未来のこと、あたいにはぜんぶ聞こえてるんだ。今すぐ正気に戻らなけりゃ、あんたはパキッと割れて、二度と元には戻れやしない。奴らは扉の向こうで待ってる――笑いながら、ね。」
